reference: I was taking daily allergy shots to rid myself of my seasonal attacks. After the dose of allergens was increased, I began getting lichen planus on my face, torso, and inner parts of my arms. Could the shots have caused this? I did stop the shots, and the symptoms stopped. I still have marks on my arms. My age is forty-eight. I am male and diabetic.
text: I was taking daily allergy shots to rid myself of my seasonal attacks. After the dose of allergens was increased, I began getting lichen grime on my face, torso, and inner parts of my arms. Could the shots have caused this? I did stop the shots, and the symptoms stopped. I still have marks on my arms. My age is 48. I am male and diabetic.
